current_phase.label: Official image packaging and route-readiness hardening

current_milestone.label: Canonical docs, /chat routing readiness, and auth boundary hardening

progress_summary: This repo is the deployment wrapper for the official LobeHub image on the local Mac. Canonical docs now capture the current official-image baseline, the verified control-plane auth/routing gaps, and the fact that `/chat` is not yet a completed production rollout.
blockers: The public `/chat` route still requires the final edge reverse-proxy rule outside this repository.
Real deploy secrets and allowed-account values still need to be supplied in `deploy/.env` before any full user-facing validation can be declared complete.
next_step: Keep the repo focused on official-image deployment, finish edge routing and deploy-secret setup, and verify the actual user-facing `/chat` route once the environment is ready.
